description.value:
A small silvered vial set with a hinged dropper carved from agate. Tradition holds that a drop placed under the tongue lets a poisoner's hand falter — once. The body, briefly, gets to ask whether it really wants to be poisoned.

Functions only with substances designed to be drawn through this dropper before swallowing.

Attunement. Requires attunement.

Second Sip. While attuned, once per day, when you would fail a Constitution saving throw against addiction to an ingested substance, you may take a single drop from this vial and re-roll the save; you must use the new roll. Uses recover at the end of a long rest.

effects.name: Tongue of the Oracle — Save Modifier
effects.description: Grants a single daily reroll on a failed Constitution saving throw against addiction to ingested substances taken through this dropper. Uses recover at the end of a long rest, tracked on the vial's native uses pool.
